The '''''Star Dream''''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that was owned and operated by [[Hoban (captain)|Hoban]], around the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Jizz/Legends|Jizz]] band, [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]] used this vessel to travel to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1st}}
